description: MIDI CC to parameter mappings for 16 assignable knobs (4 banks × 4 knobs). Bank 1 is fixed; Banks 2-4 are customizable.

mappings.label: LPF Cutoff
mappings.notes: Filter brightness; sweep this for classic synth movement

mappings.label: LPF Peak
mappings.notes: Filter emphasis; controls the peak at cutoff frequency

mappings.label: Wave Blend
mappings.notes: Blends sine overtone into the main waveform; creates richer tones

mappings.label: Master Volume
mappings.notes: Overall output level; 0.95 max to prevent clipping

mappings.label: LFO Depth
mappings.notes: Modulation wheel; depth of LFO modulation applied to VCA/VCF

mappings.label: ADSR Attack
mappings.notes: Envelope attack time; quick changes for articulation

mappings.label: Noise Level
mappings.notes: Pink noise blended pre-filter; adds texture and breath

mappings.label: HPF Cutoff
mappings.notes: High-pass filter; removes bass, adds brightness

mappings.label: ADSR Release
mappings.notes: Envelope release tail; controls note fadeout time

mappings.label: ADSR Decay
mappings.notes: Envelope decay; shapes the initial note contour

mappings.label: Delay Mix
mappings.notes: Delay feedback send; adds space and repeats

mappings.label: Chorus Mix
mappings.notes: Chorus depth; fattens tone with modulated comb filtering

mappings.label: LFO Rate
mappings.notes: LFO speed; controls modulation oscillator frequency

mappings.label: HPF Peak
mappings.notes: High-pass filter emphasis; peaks the resonance at HPF cutoff

mappings.label: ADSR Sustain
mappings.notes: Envelope sustain level; held note brightness

cutoff.note: Frequency in Hz; CC 0-127 maps linearly to log frequency
